**Tech Stack**: {{TECH_STACK}}
**Dev Server**: {{BASE_URL}}

## How to Run

```bash
bash init.sh           # Start dev server, wait for READY
{{DEV_COMMAND}}        # Development server
{{BUILD_COMMAND}}      # Production build
{{TEST_COMMAND}}       # Run all tests
{{TEST_COMMAND}} -- {{EXAMPLE_TEST}}  # Run specific test
```

## File Structure

<!-- Generated by initializer agent based on tech stack -->

## Naming Conventions

| Type | Convention | Example |
|------|------------|---------|
| React Components | PascalCase | `UserProfile.tsx` |
| Utility Functions | camelCase | `formatDate.ts` |
| API Routes | kebab-case | `/api/user-profile` |
| Database Models | PascalCase singular | `User`, `BlogPost` |
| Test Files | Same name + `.test` | `auth.test.ts` |

## NEVER DO

- Don't delete or modify tests that pass
- Don't set `passes: true` without running verification
- Don't commit code that fails to build
- Don't modify prd.json acceptance criteria
- Don't skip the startup ritual
- Don't hardcode secrets or API keys
